result.stdout:
Protogen tool
    Usage:
        protogen --help | -H
        protogen --version | -V
        protogen <pgenFileName> COMMAND ARGUMENTS
    Commands:
        check - check if it is possible to lock given pgen types
        lock - lock given pgen types, an error is raised if evolution is not possible
        proto - generate protobuf description: proto [-o|--output] outputFile
        fsharp-types - generate fsharp types: fsharp-types [-o|--output] outputFile [--update-commons | --update-commons-in commonsFile]
        fsharp-proto-converters - generate converters between protobuf classes and fsharp types: fsharp-proto-converters [-o|--output] outputFile
        fsharp-json-converters - generate converters between json and fsharp types: fsharp-json-converters [-o|--output] outputFile
        fable-converters - 
generate converters between protobuf's json and fsharp types for fable environment: fable-converters [-o|--output] outputFile [--update-commons | --update-commons-in commonsFile]
                !!! Do not forget to add package Fable.SimpleJson

commands.payload:
